description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named esp32c2 that runs on workflow dispatch and push to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, verifies the existence of ci/ci-compile, performs pre-build steps using a template workflow for the uno board, copies board JSON files, and then builds for ESP32-C2 using the same template workflow with the esp32-c2-devkitm-1 board.
